metadata.description: A minimal plugin marketplace combining the Simple MCP Server and Simple Skill: exposes three utility tools for AI agents (add, get_datetime, echo) with full agent usage guidance.

plugins.name: simple-plugin
plugins.description: Simple Plugin bundles the Simple MCP Server and Simple Skill: three lightweight tools (add, get_datetime, echo) with full agent usage guidance. Ideal as a starter plugin, connectivity health-check, or reference implementation.
